full_name: Non-alloy / low-alloy structural steel S355J2, material number 1.0570 (old designation St52-3)
version_year: composition per EN 10025-2:2004 (also EN 10250-2:2000 for forgings)
scope: Fine-grain structural steel with minimum yield strength 355 MPa. 'J2' = 27 J impact energy at -20 C. Higher strength than S235; used in general machine/plant engineering, shipbuilding, gearboxes and load-bearing structures.
license_note: composition/property data widely republished by independent free sources, not the copyrighted DIN document text
